fields.How do you sell right now?: Mainly cold email and organic Instagram. Sometimes referrals.
fields.Explain your Offer or service?: We build automated email marketing flows that recover 20% of abandoned carts and increase LTV without ad spend.
fields.How do you currently get leads?: Sending 500 cold emails a day and posting 3 reels a week.
fields.How do you close them? (Call, email, che: Usually a 30-min Zoom discovery call and then a proposal.
fields.Once a customer buys, how do you deliver: We have a Slack channel, onboard them in 48 hours, and push the first flows live in 7 days.
fields.What's your 12-month revenue/profit goal: Hit $100k MRR ($1.2M run rate) with 60% margins.
fields.What's your biggest bottleneck right now: Leads. We have a great offer but no predictable inbound mechanism.
fields.How much cash/time can you invest to fix: I can invest 10 hours a week and $2,000/month.
